texto: Pardon me, you ... love life? You who exclaim and sing over and over and dance it too: "i love you, life! Oh, I love you, life!" Do you? Well, go on, love it! Camp life -- love that too! It, too, is life!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Aleksander Solženitsyn que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Pardon me, you ... love life? You who exclaim and sing over and over and dance it too: "i love yo…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, love, prison, com foco em love e prison.
